description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1), operating in manual mode, was traveling east on 20th Street in stop-and-go traffic, approaching the traffic light 
at Mission Street in San Francisco. The Zoox vehicle inched forward and then gradually slowed for stopped traffic ahead when it was rear 
ended by an SUV (Vehicle 2) traveling directly behind. The rear bumper of the Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage. There were no 
reported injuries, and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
